title: Gold Little Changed as US and Iran Agree to Extend Nuclear Talks
description: Gold steadied after the US and Iran agreed to prolong nuclear talks, keeping markets on edge about the potential for conflict in the Middle East.
content: Gold steadied after the US and Iran agreed to prolong nuclear talks, keeping markets on edge about the potential for conflict in the Middle East.
